positive: A sophisticated, minimalist illustration of a stylized celestial animal, perhaps a cosmic phoenix or lunar griffin, emerging from a swirling nebula cloud. The design should feature clean, bold silhouettes against a deep cosmic midnight blue and gradient gold background. Incorporate fine, delicate linework resembling constellations and bioluminescent nebula smoke. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, optimized for high-contrast apparel printing. Studio quality illustration, engraved etching style combined with modern vector art, high saturation, volumetric lighting, flat color fill areas with strong graphic lines. --ar 1:1
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, low detail, noise, artifacts, blur, grain, gradient fade, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, photographic, realistic photo
